listings.name: Days Inn by Wyndham Louisville Airport Fair & Expo Center
listings.description: Hotel at I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd) in Louisville, Jefferson County, near the airport and Kentucky Expo Center. Advertises free parking for vehicles of all sizes, including truck, bus and RV parking. Genuinely serves I-65 (interchange is on I-65, not I-264).
listings.corroboration: Address 2905 Fern Valley Rd / Louisville 40213 confirmed by hotel's own site, Wyndham brand page, GoToLouisville (official CVB), HotelPlanner and Yelp. Free truck/bus/RV parking stated on the hotel's own marketing site and listed in the Hotels4Truckers truck-friendly directory. I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd) confirmed via AARoads I-65 Louisville exit guide. Wyndham official page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch; details corroborated across >=2 independent sources.

listings.name: Motel 6 Louisville, KY - Airport/Fair Expo
listings.description: Budget motel in the airport hotel cluster off I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd), Louisville, Jefferson County. Some third-party booking sites report on-site truck parking, but this could not be confirmed on an official source.
listings.hold_reason: Truck/large-vehicle parking is reported only by third-party booking aggregators (ParkSleepHotels and other travel sites); the official Motel 6 property page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch and truck-parking availability could not be independently confirmed on an official source. Identity/address (6121 Airport Hotels Blvd, Louisville 40213; phone 502-742-4722) and I-65 Exit 128 location are corroborated, but category-fit (confirmed truck parking) is not.
listings.corroboration: Address and phone corroborated by Motel 6 property page, Yelp and GoToLouisville. Truck-parking claim appears only on aggregator/park-sleep listings and is unverified on an official source, so held.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #238 (and its CAT Scale)
excluded.reason: Located at I-65 Exit 116 in Bullitt County (Shepherdsville), south of the Bullitt/Jefferson County line and ~20 mi south of downtown Louisville. Exit 116 is below this segment's stated exit-117 lower bound; belongs to the adjacent southern I-65 segment. Not one of the 99 existing (I-75 eastern KY) production listings.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center, 2050 E Blue Lick Rd (and its CAT Scale, 502-955-5049)
excluded.reason: Located at I-65 Exit 121 in Bullitt County (Shepherdsville). North of Love's but still in Bullitt County, south of the Jefferson County line; falls in the adjacent southern I-65 segment, not the Louisville/Jefferson County (seg5) segment. Excluded to avoid cross-segment overlap; genuine I-65 facility.

excluded.name: RaceTrac Travel Center, 145 Alpha Way
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 116, Bullitt County (Shepherdsville). Below segment lower bound / outside Jefferson County; belongs to adjacent southern segment.

excluded.name: I-65 Weigh Station (KYTC/KSP)
excluded.reason: The I-65 weigh/inspection station in this stretch is in Bullitt County (Shepherdsville area), not Jefferson County. No I-65 weigh station exists within the Louisville/Jefferson County segment. Exact direction/mile marker not independently confirmed; out of segment.

excluded.name: Baymont Inn & Suites Louisville Airport South, 6515 Signature Dr
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd), Jefferson County, but no truck/large-vehicle parking could be confirmed from any source. Excluded pending truck-parking verification (would otherwise fit Hotels with Truck Parking).

excluded.name: Speedco / Blue Beacon / TA-Petro (nearest KY I-65 locations)
excluded.reason: Nearest branded truck-service/wash facilities on I-65 in Kentucky are far south (Exit 6 Franklin, Exit 81 Sonora, Exit 86 Glendale, etc.), well outside the Louisville/Jefferson County segment. No Speedco, Blue Beacon, or TA/Petro exists on I-65 within Jefferson County.

excluded.name: Ken Towery / Goodyear tire & auto service (Preston Hwy)
excluded.reason: Preston Highway tire/auto shops (e.g., 6601 & 11480 Preston Hwy) are passenger/light-truck car-care shops, not heavy-duty semi tire-repair facilities, and are not sited at an I-65 exit. Do not fit the Tire Repair (truck) category.

excluded.name: CAT Scale (Louisville/Jefferson County on I-65)
excluded.reason: No CAT Scale exists on I-65 within Jefferson County. Nearest CAT Scales are at I-65 Exit 116 and Exit 121 in Shepherdsville (Bullitt County) — see Love's/Pilot exclusions above. Nothing verifiable to list in Jefferson County.
